title: The Crew Leaves the Ancient Island
description: On pages 9–12, the crew leaves the ancient island as the Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent.
scene: The Crew Leaves the Ancient Island. The Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Huh? How do you know about Mr. 3?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh my! :) Electric as always, Nami! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You were talking with Mr. O...?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: It seems he mistook me for Mr. 3.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And now he thinks that we're all dead!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah. Or at least, that's what I told him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: just when we FINALLY throw off our pursuers, we can't even step a FOOT off of this island!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: What? Do we still have unfinished business here or something?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I mean, I managed to get this from them and all...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I was so worried over what to do...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I didn't think it'd make you this happy...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Alright, guys! It's time for a Senbei party!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy! This ain't gonna be much of a party if we've only got 3 crackers left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: this isn't the time for that. It's time to set sail, captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We can't just loiter around here forever!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You haven't forgotten about our hunting contest, have you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hm? Oh, I'm sure I've won that.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I caught a rhino 'bout thiiiiiiis big.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A rhino!? Can you even eat that thing?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Alright then, Mr. Round, Mr. Giant!

summary: This part centers on the crew leaves the ancient island, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
